source.name: Chapter 1.6: 1.3 Test Your Knowledge - BankingAssistantLiteAgent
source.instructions: **Why does this course set `configuration.module` to `BankingAssistantLiteAgent` in the sub-agent `config.yml`?**

answers.answer: Because MCP requires a Lite agent in all Rasa projects
Because the Rasa tutorial LLM host does not support the default ReAct tool-calling API shape; the Lite agent routes to MCP tools with a compatible pattern
To disable the sub-agent and run only main-agent tools

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT explain why configuration.module is set for the tutorial host
source.guidance: The stock ReAct sub-agent sends tool definitions on every LLM call; the hosted tutorial model used with `RASA_LICENSE` only is not compatible. `BankingAssistantLiteAgent` is the course-provided alternative.
